name: @vt/vt-daemon-client
description: Typed HTTP client + ensure-launcher for the standalone VTD (vt-daemon) controller. Mirrors @vt/graph-db-client for graphd: ensureVtDaemonForVault discovers, waits, claims, spawns, or stale-reclaims the per-vault VTD owner via the BF-348 single-flight + spawn-lock protocol, then returns a VtDaemonClient bound to the discovered loopback port with the published bearer auth-token. Runtime dependency on @vt/vt-daemon goes through HTTP, not module imports — types only.
